Capabilities

Demo Projects

A selection of concept websites designed to demonstrate our design, development, and conversion-focused approach. These are self-initiated demo projects created to showcase our capabilities.

Demo Project

StoneBridge Construction

Premium website for a construction company focused on generating leads and showcasing completed projects.

Modern healthcare website designed for appointment bookings and building patient trust.

Next.js Framer Motion CSS Grid Booking UI

What We Do

Tailored Agency Services

We build digital experiences that represent your brand as a market leader. Every design is customized from scratch.

Website Design

Unique design concepts reflecting your luxury brand identity. No pre-made templates, fully designed in Figma and handcrafted.

Landing Pages

High-converting landing pages tailored to specific ad campaigns. Engineered to capture attention and convert visitors.

Website Redesign

Transform your outdated site into a modern conversion machine. Keep your SEO ranking while upgrading your layout.

Business Websites

Web presence engineered for corporate and local firms. Incorporating call scheduling, live chat, and customer pathways.

Portfolio Websites

Visual-rich, interactive portfolios built for creatives, designers, architects, and high-end services.

AI Automation

Integrate AI-driven chat widgets, dynamic lead routing, automated CRM hooks, and follow-up calendars.

SEO Foundations

Clean metadata structures, image compression, structured schema markup, and indexing scripts setup.

Website Maintenance

Monthly security patches, backup logs, content updates, speed health reports, and direct developer communication.

Our Method

The Development Journey

A structured, high-visibility timeline built to keep your project on schedule and clear at every milestone.

01

Discover

Deep-dive discovery session to align on your brand identity, business model, and concrete conversion targets.

Week 1
02

Strategy

Sitemap creation, information architecture design, wireframes, and strategic user pathway layouts mapping to conversions.

Week 2
03

Design

Bespoke UI designs created in Figma using interactive high-fidelity pages. Fully approved before any coding starts.

Weeks 3-4
04

Development

Coding clean, responsive HTML/CSS/JS or server systems. Zero template code. 100% hand-crafted engineering.

Weeks 5-6
05

Launch

Rigorous visual QA testing, technical SEO config, speed indexing audits, and domain mapping live launch.

Week 7
06

Support

Post-launch analysis, ongoing speed reviews, monthly visual updates, and scalable optimization adjustments.

Continuous
The Difference

Built for Performance

Why premium brands and growth startups partner with NikvoraStudio to create their web presence.

Premium User Interface

Every block, interaction, and hover effect is custom designed for visual excellence. We avoid standard cookie-cutter grids to give your brand a distinct high-end luxury startup aesthetic.

Fast Delivery

We launch within set timelines by working in weekly design sprints. Zero lag.

Unlimited Communication

Access a dedicated Slack channel directly with your lead developer. Updates in real time.

Responsive Design

Fully fluid layouts that feel like native apps on mobile devices, loading instantly.

Focused on Business Growth

We don't just design for beauty—we study customer metrics, user psychology, and CTA placements. Our main goal is to convert your site traffic into direct revenue.

Clean Code

Hand-written system code. No bloated page-builders like WordPress or Elementor.

Features

Why Choose NikvoraStudio

Every website is built with one goal: helping businesses look professional and convert more visitors into customers.

Modern Premium Design

Clean, high-end interfaces that build trust from the first impression.

Mobile-First Experience

Every website is optimized for phones, tablets, and desktops.

Fast Performance

Lightweight, optimized websites that load quickly and improve user experience.

SEO-Ready Foundation

Proper semantic structure, metadata, and performance best practices for better search visibility.

Conversion-Focused Layout

Strategic CTAs, clear messaging, and layouts designed to generate more enquiries.

Ongoing Support

Assistance after launch for updates, fixes, and improvements.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Clear answers to common questions about working with NikvoraStudio.

Every website we build is custom-designed and hand-coded from scratch. Our project rates generally range from $5,000 to $15,000 depending on complexity, page count, and integrations. We provide an exact, fixed quote after our discovery call.

A standard custom website takes about 5 to 7 weeks from discovery session to live launch. Complex systems with custom API setups or automation dashboards may take up to 8 to 10 weeks. We define weekly deliverables to keep you in the loop.

We provide unlimited design revisions within the Figma design stage. We believe in collaborative feedback and only move to development once you are 100% in love with the layout mockup. Post-launch code adjustments are covered in our maintenance agreements.

Yes. We deploy websites using ultra-fast content delivery networks (Netlify, Vercel, or AWS Edge hosting) and handle all domain pointer migrations, SSL configurations, and caching setups for you.

Yes. We offer recurring monthly support packages that cover server health, security upgrades, SEO reports, and 2-4 hours of content changes. You are never left without developer access.

Let's Build a Website That Makes Your Business Stand Out.

Whether you're starting from scratch or refreshing an outdated website, we'll create a fast, modern website that represents your business professionally and helps turn visitors into customers.

Get a Free Consultation
